16.gl: to jut over or exceed; by implication, to excel; (intransitively) to remain or be left; causatively, to leave, cause to abound, preserve
16.kj: excel, leave (a remnant), left behind, too much, make plenteous, preserve, (be, let) remain(-der, -ing, -nant), reserve, residue, rest.

16.gl: an offence (sometimes habitual sinfulness), and its penalty, occasion, sacrifice, or expiation; also (concretely) an offender
16.kj: punishment (of sin), purifying(-fication for sin), sin(-ner, offering).

16.gl: to crack off, i.e. (figuratively) burst out in rage
16.kj: (be) anger(-ry), displease, fret self, (provoke to) wrath (come), be wroth.

17.gl: the face (as the part that turns); used in a great variety of applications (literally and figuratively); also (with prepositional prefix) as a preposition (before, etc.)
17.kj: [phrase] accept, a-(be-) fore(-time), against, anger, [idiom] as (long as), at, [phrase] battle, [phrase] because (of), [phrase] beseech, countenance, edge, [phrase] employ, endure
17.dv: plural (but always as singular) of an unused noun פָּנֶה; from H6437 (פָּנָה));

17.gl: to give, used with greatest latitude of application (put, make, etc.)
17.kj: add, apply, appoint, ascribe, assign, [idiom] avenge, [idiom] be (healed), bestow, bring (forth, hither), cast, cause, charge, come, commit, consider, count, [phrase] cry, deliver

17.gl: to lift, in a great variety of applications, literal and figurative, absolute and relative

17.gl: properly, a standing, i.e. a spot; but used widely of a locality (general or specific); also (figuratively) of a condition (of body or mind)
17.kj: country, [idiom] home, [idiom] open, place, room, space, [idiom] whither(-soever).
17.dv: or מָקֹם; also (feminine) מְקוֹמָה; or מְקֹמָה; from H6965 (קוּם);

17.gl: to cover (specifically with bitumen); figuratively, to expiate or condone, to placate or cancel
17.kj: appease, make (an atonement, cleanse, disannul, forgive, be merciful, pacify, pardon, purge (away), put off, (make) reconcile(-liation).

17.gl: an offence (sometimes habitual sinfulness), and its penalty, occasion, sacrifice, or expiation; also (concretely) an offender
17.kj: punishment (of sin), purifying(-fication for sin), sin(-ner, offering).

18.gl: blood (as that which when shed causes death) of man or an animal; by analogy, the juice of the grape; figuratively (especially in the plural) bloodshed (i.e. drops of blood)

18.kj: [idiom] at all, burn up, consume, devour(-er, up), dine, eat(-er, up), feed (with), food, [idiom] freely, [idiom] in...wise(-deed, plenty), (lay) meat, [idiom] quite.

18.gl: a sacred place or thing; rarely abstract, sanctity
18.kj: consecrated (thing), dedicated (thing), hallowed (thing), holiness, ([idiom] most) holy ([idiom] day, portion, thing), saint, sanctuary.
appoint, (for-) bid, (give a) charge, (give a, give in, send with) command(-er, -ment), send a messenger, put, (set) in order.

19.dv: plural (but always as singular) of an unused noun פָּנֶה; from H6437 (פָּנָה));
